bakery style oreo stuffed cookies 🍪🥛    recipe: ingredients: ¾ cup salted butter, softened (170 g) ¾ cup packed brown sugar (150 g) ¼ cup granulated sugar (50 g) 1 large egg  1 tsp vanilla (5 g) 2 cups all-purpose flour (240 g) 1 tbsp cornstarch (8 g) ½ tsp baking soda (3 g) ¼ tsp salt (1.5 g) oreos, some whole some  roughly chopped  white chocolate (measure with your heart)  & choceur cookie and cream chocolate’s   instructions: cream the butter and sugars together  until smooth and slightly fluffy. mix in the egg and vanilla until fully combined. in a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, cornstarch, baking soda, and salt. fold the dry ingredients into the wet just until combined.  chop some of the oreos into small chunks ( leave some for topping ) and fold them in along with the white chocolate. scoop the dough into 8 portions, flatten and add an oreo inside and chocolate then shape into tall mounds. ( i flatten the top but keep them tall ) bake at 375°F for 11–14 minutes, until the edges are set and the centers are still soft. ( baking time may vary ) let cool to set the cookies!  i added moser roths white chocolate to the bottom & inside !    #oreo #cookies #chocolatechipcookies #Recipe #baking

#WOOJIN — POV: Woojin as your ex-boyfriend who found happiness in you. It’s 2 a.m., and you can’t sleep, so you decide to scroll through your phone. Then, you come across a poster: “CONGRATULATIONS 4SHOBOIZ ON WINNING ROOKIE OF THE YEAR.” Your eyes fix on a black-haired guy with a slit eyebrow. Your heart beats faster than before. The feelings are familiar, just like when you first saw him on the hallway. But this time, something is different. His expression is cold. Happiness is no longer written on his face. He’s no longer the sweet, carefree boy you used to know. You sigh. 2 years ago “I think we should break up,” you said. He smiled softly. “You know you can’t joke about things like that. It’s not funny.” You turned your head and saw him focused on his laptop, headphones on, nodding along to the new beat he made without even looking at you. The two of you were in his studio. “Woojin, I’m serious. You’re about to debut, and a lot of people will be watching you. I don’t want our relationship to become a reason for people to hate you. You know how toxic this industry is, right?” Woojin finally turned toward you, his eyes locked onto yours. “I would give up everything just to be with you. I don’t care how toxic people are. I don’t care what everyone thinks of me. You are my only happiness. You are my dream. How am I supposed to find happiness when the person who gave meaning to my life is no longer beside me? It’s hard for me to breathe, to smile, to even dream without you here. Don’t ever think about leaving me. Please…” He said softly while holding your hands, his eyes tearing up as his voice almost broke. “I’m sorry. I need to see you on stage. I know you’ve been dreaming about it since you were five. Sometimes love is about letting go, and I hope you can let me go too. Do it, Woojin. Get that ROTY and SOTY you’ve always dreamed of. I’ll always be here supporting you no matter what.” You slowly let go of his hands. “And for the last time, as your lover... I love you, Woojin. And I always will.” You walked out of his studio, leaving him behind in tears.  #lngshot #kpop #edits #pov

매일 새벽 손으로 직접 만드는 수제만두, 젊은 사장님에게서 느껴지는 '할머니의 손맛' 📍망원 연만두  (주소: 서울 마포구 망원로 77 1층 연만두)   🔗네이버 지도: https://naver.me/5Kb3ejlY   🥟만두 한 판 8,500원 / 왕치즈군만두 1개 2,500원   📦택배 신청: 매주 월요일 오후 5시까지 문자 접수 (연락처: 010-5941- 7816)   망원시장의 소문난 만두 맛집 '연만두'. 많은 분이 연세 지긋한 할머니가 운영하실 거라 오해할 만큼 깊은 손맛을 자랑하는 곳입니다. 하지만 이곳의 주인공은 만두에 인생을 건 젊은 사장님이었는데요.  그 깊은 맛의 비결은 진심어린 정성에 있었습니다.  "기계는 재료를 뭉개버린다"는 철학 아래, 매일 새벽부터 나와 모든 재료를 일일이 손으로 버무리고 직접 빚으시더라구요. 재료 하나하나의 식감이 살아있는 꽉 찬 만두 속은 그렇게 사장님의 고집으로 완성됩니다.  워낙 정성껏 소량만 준비하기 때문에 금세 품절되기로 유명한데요. 방문 전 전화 주문이나 네이버 예약을 이용하시면 헛걸음 없이 바로 가져가실 수 있으니 꼭 참고하세요!   주문 즉시 튀겨주시는 치즈 군만두는 갓 튀겨낸 바삭한 식감 속에 고소하게 늘어나는 치즈와 만두 속의 조화가 그야말로 환상적입니다.. 정성과 맛, 어느 하나 빠지지 않는 망원동의 진정한 인생 만두를 만나보세요!   - Deep flavor hand-mixed every dawn: Finding 'Grandmother's Touch' in a Young Master 📍망원 연만두 'Yeon-Mandu' (77, Mangwon-ro, Mapo-gu, Seoul, Republic of Korea)   🔗 https://maps.app.goo.gl/jDhS1Q11mVTn1mBA9   'Yeon-Mandu' is a renowned dumpling spot near Mangwon Market, famous for a deep, traditional flavor that leads many to assume an elderly grandmother must be running the shop. Surprisingly, the true master behind these dumplings is a young man who has dedicated his life to this craft.   The secret to such profound flavor lies in his sincere devotion. Following his philosophy that "machines crush the ingredients' texture," he starts his day in the early hours of the dawn, hand-mixing and folding every single dumpling. This stubborn commitment is what creates the perfect filling, where the texture of each ingredient remains intact and vibrant.   Because each dumpling is made with such meticulous care in limited quantities, they are famous for selling out quickly. We highly recommend placing a phone order or using Naver Reservation before your visit to ensure you don't miss out!  Don't miss the Cheese Fried Dumplings, fried to order for a perfectly crispy texture. The harmony of the savory, melting cheese and the rich dumpling filling is simply heavenly. Come and experience a true "life-changing" dumpling in Mangwon-dong, where passion and tradition meet! 🥟 #서울맛집 #망원동 #koreanfood #seoul #streetfood

Ooey-Gooey Scoopable Nutella Cookie Pie🤤 Yields: 15-16 Chunky Cookies INGREDIENTS:  230g Cold Chopped Unsalted Butter  160g Caster Sugar  160g Light Brown Sugar  450g Chocolate Chunks or chips  475g Plain Flour  1 tsp Salt 3 tsp Baking Powder  3/4 tsp Baking Soda  2 Eggs  1 Egg Yolk  1 tsp Vanilla  INSTRUCTIONS: •Cut cling wrap into small squares. Scoop ½ teaspoon Nutella onto individual cling-wrap squares. Fold to seal and freeze until solid. (Repeat for however many Nutella stuffed cookies you plan to make.) •In a large mixing bowl, add the cold cubed butter and whisk until slightly creamy. Add the white sugar and light brown sugar, then whisk together until well combined and fluffy. •Add the eggs, vanilla extract, and chocolate chips or chunks. Whisk until fully incorporated. •Add the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Gently mix until just combined, do not overmix. •Portion the dough into 90g balls. Press a frozen Nutella piece into the centre of each dough ball, seal well, and roll into a smooth ball. •Place the stuffed cookie dough balls onto a tray and freeze for at least 30 minutes (or overnight for best results). •Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F). •Take any shape baking dish circle, square, rectangle anything and line it with parchment paper. Arrange frozen cookie dough balls in it leaving some space between them. •Bake for 10-15 minutes (timing depends on the type of pan) or until the tops are lightly golden while the centres remain soft and gooey. •Remove from the oven and let cool slightly. •Serve warm with ice cream and chocolate sauce enjoy!✨ NOTE: Store any extra dough balls in an airtight container or freezer bag and freeze for later. Whenever a cookie craving hits, bake straight from frozen🫶🏻 #cookie #nutella #cookiepie #fyp #viral

Ultra Creamy Buldak Ramen 🍝🥟 Ingredients 1 pack Buldak ramen 1–2 tbsp butter 2 cloves garlic (minced) 1 tbsp Kewpie mayo Buldak sauce packet Buldak powder packet 1 tbsp chili oil ¾–1 cup heavy cream Mozzarella cheese Dumplings Sausages Green onions Sesame seeds Extra chili oil (for topping) Instructions Cook noodles until al dente, then drain and set aside. In a pan, melt butter over medium heat. Add minced garlic and sauté until fragrant. Add Kewpie mayo, Buldak sauce, and powder packet. Mix well until it turns thick and glossy. Add chili oil and stir. Pour in heavy cream and mix until smooth, creamy, and slightly thickened (that rich orange color 🔥). Add noodles and toss until fully coated. Sprinkle mozzarella cheese on top and let it melt into the sauce. Add dumplings and sausages on top. Cover and let everything heat through. Finish with green onions, sesame seeds, and extra chili oil drizzle. . #buldak #buldakramen #eat #cook #Foodie

Replying to @alabasterindistries The High Fashion Olympics: the first 15/25 teams.  China  The blazer underneath the coat is worn with the collar up to parallel a Tanghuang, a traditional Chinese jacket which features the mandarin collar which originated in imperial china, as early as 200BC, the texture and material of the outer coat is to represent the dragon, which is the fifth animal in the Chinese zodiac cycle, which corresponds to the year 2024, the Wood Dragon and the year of the recent Olympic Games, the star brooches also representing the starts on the flag.  USA The classic red white and blue, with classic denim. The look itself is “Made in America” as it features American icons such as Ralph Lauren, and nephew Greg Lauren, as well as one of the most iconic American brands, Coach. The look also contains accessories from Chrome Hearts as well as a hint of the Brooklyn Based streetwear brand Kidsuper. Japan Inspired by the original leaders of the avant-garde movement in fashion this look takes inspiration from Japanese designers like Yohji Yamamoto and Rei Kawakubo in a way that utilizes the flags colors and design.  Palestine  Initially I was solely going to create a look drawing inspiration from a traditional Palestinian garment called a Thawb, and upon my research I discovered hundreds of Palestinian athletes had been killed recently amongst the atrocities ongoing in Gaza. Understanding the strength and courage it would take to perform at a world stage given a genocide in your own own country, I wanted to make a look that feels like a human embodiment of the flag itself but most importantly, I wanted something that felt beautiful and free. Canada Consisting of popular Canadian brands Dquared2 and Canada goose, this look takes direct inspiration of the Canadian flag design, down to the squared brooch in the center of the vest. Stylistically, something you’d want to wear during a Canadian winter.  Spain This look features a cropped jacket and slim trousers, in the Spanish colors and takes direct inspiration from the “traje de luces”, which are the traditional garments that Spanish bullfighters wear in action. Great Britain The inspiration for this look is the layering of the colors in the Union Jack. Red at the core with white to follow moving out, and blue surrounding them both, thus was the instruction for the layering. The look also features a crown brooch, a royal touch.  France  This look Features French Fashion giants Balmain, Louis Vuitton, and Hermès, the latter responsible for arguably the most popular designer bag of all time, the Birkin. This look Features the iconic Haut à Courroies 50 in Crocodile, one of the most coveted and financially consuming bags from the legendary french house. South Korea This look follows the design of the South Korean flag and takes inspiration from modern Korean fashion.  Germany There’s a lot more black than I would have preferred to use for this look, but those from the capital city, Berlin, are known for wearing said color. I wanted this look to have a more structured shape to reference Bauhaus design which originated in Germany. The look also mostly consists of Rick Owens, a designer who references Bauhaus in his work. Ireland  This look is inspired by traditional Irish’s formal wear styled in the flags colors. Ukraine  Following the design of the Ukrainian flag, this look features a sunflower brooch, the sunflower being the national flower of Ukraine. Australia  Inspired from the design of the Australian flag  Pakistan  Inspired by the design of the Pakistan flag Nigeria  Inspired by the colors of the Nigerian flag, stylistically, the volume of this look takes inspiration from the Agbada, which is traditional male attire worn amongst the Yoruba men in Nigeria.

Then, add water and simmer, scraping the bottom of the pan, until the water is almost entirely evaporated. .  Prep the toppings. While the taco meat is cooking, dice tomatoes, shred lettuce, and dice an avocado. .  Toast the shells. Arrange the taco shells on a baking sheet and bake for five minutes until lightly toasted and fragrant. .
